title: Pesto Hasselback Potato Traybake
summary: An easy vegan recipe by Bunch that you can throw in the oven, this hasselback potato traybake is taken to the next level by heaps of vegan pesto.

ingredients.label: Handful of Fresh Herbs (Rosemary, Oregano or Thyme)
ingredients.name: Rosemary

ingredients.label: 1 Jar of Sacla' Vegan Basil Pesto (Sacla' Vegan Chilli Pesto or Sacla' Vegan Tomato Pesto Will Also Work Well Instead)
ingredients.name: Vegan Basil Pesto

ingredients.label: 1 Jar of Sacla' Vegan Basil Pesto (Sacla' Vegan Chilli Pesto or Sacla' Vegan Tomato Pesto Will Also Work Well Instead)
ingredients.name: Pesto

method.description: Scrub the potatoes clean and halve them lengthways. Carefully slice 2mm thin segments through the potato, cut-side down, using a chopstick on either side to stop the knife from going all the way through. The potatoes should be intact at the base.
Cut the garlic bulbs in half through the middle of the cloves.

Lay the potatoes and garlic halves on a large lined baking tray. Drizzle plenty of olive oil over the potatoes, making sure to get some into the crevices and over the flat side too. Drizzle some olive oil over the cut side of the garlic halves and place them cut-side down on the baking tray. Sprinkle plenty of salt and pepper and bake for 20 mins.
Peel and cut the onion into eighths.
Once the 20 mins are up, remove the tray and brush the top of each potato generously with 2 tbsp of vegan pesto.
Lay the cherry tomatoes, broccoli and red onion around the potatoes. Add the herbs here over the top. Drizzle with oil and season well. Bake for another 10 mins.
Remove the tray from the oven and scatter the olives, if using, around the tray and bake for another 5 mins.
When ready to serve, drizzle more pesto all of the vegetables and finish with a shaving of lemon zest, if using.

chefs.name: Christina Soteriou
chefs.summary: Christina (@christinasots) is a plant-based chef and recipe developer with a love for the Mediterranean flavours of her home, Cyprus. With an equal balance of healthy, flavourful and easy to make, there are no compromises here!
